UserId.description: The user ID associated with the payment account.

PaymentAccountId.description: Unique identifier for the payment account.

CanRemoveFromCustomerView.description: Indicates if the payment account can be removed from the customer view.

Bin.description: Bank Identification Number (BIN) of the payment method.

IsDefaultPaymentMethod.description: Indicates if this is the default payment method.

IsVisibleToCustomer.description: Indicates if the payment account is visible to the customer.

PaymentAccountType.description: The type of payment account (e.g., card, PayPal).

CustomerId.description: The customer ID associated with the payment account.
